source_intake_record.raw_question_text: An electron is travelling in a vacuum at a speed of $3.4 \times 10^{7} \mathrm{~m} \mathrm{~s}^{-1}$. The electron enters a region of uniform magnetic field of flux density 3.2 mT, as illustrated in Fig. 8.1. The initial direction of the electron is at an angle of $30^{\circ}$ to the direction of the magnetic field. When the electron enters the magnetic field, the component of its velocity $v_{N}$ normal to the direction of the magnetic field causes the electron to begin to follow a circular path. Calculate: the radius of this circular path.
extraction_notes: image field contains a PIL image representation rather than a file path or URL
question references Fig. 8.1, but the text includes the needed numerical details

image_dependency: 题干完整给出速度、磁感应强度、夹角等关键信息，未显式要求查看图片或图表。
输入字段 `requires_image=false` 且 `text_dominant=true`，说明求解主要依赖文本。
虽然 `image_manifest` 中存在 1 张图片，但更像题目截图资产，不构成明显视觉推理依赖。
multi_step: 需要先从初速度和夹角求出垂直于磁场的分速度 `v_N = v sin 30^\circ`。
再结合带电粒子在磁场中的圆周运动关系 `r = mv_N/(qB)` 进行代入计算。
属于明确的两步以上物理量转换与公式应用，不是单步直接读取答案。
verifiability: 标准答案是单一数值结果 `$0.030 \, \mathrm{m}$`，目标形式清晰。
题干给出的物理量充分，计算过程可由规则或程序复核。
`registry_passed=true`，且答案已登记存在，说明样本结构完整、可核验性较强。

decision_reasons: 资产完整：题干、答案和图片均已登记存在，且 `issues` 为空、`registry_passed=true`。
综合质量较高：`verifiability_score=0.94`，答案为可核验的单一数值结果，便于复核。
题目具有一定推理性：`multi_step_score=0.62`，需要进行分解速度与圆周运动公式的多步计算。
当前风险仅为数值取整和单位格式差异，属于常见可控问题，不影响核心语义和入池价值。

normalization_record.normalized_question_text: An electron is travelling in a vacuum at a speed of $3.4 \times 10^{7} \, \mathrm{m\,s}^{-1}$. The electron enters a region of uniform magnetic field of flux density 3.2 mT. The initial direction of the electron is at an angle of $30^{\circ}$ to the direction of the magnetic field. When the electron enters the magnetic field, the component of its velocity $v_N$ normal to the direction of the magnetic field causes the electron to begin to follow a circular path. Calculate the radius of this circular path.
normalization_notes: Question is solvable from text alone because the needed angle, speed, and magnetic flux density are explicitly stated.

The electron enters a region of uniform magnetic field of flux density 3.2 mT, as illustrated in Fig. 8.1. candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集保留多解潜力评估，但不默认强推多解 agent。

extraction_notes: image field contains a PIL image representation rather than a file path or URL
question references Fig. 8.1, but the text includes the needed numerical details
metadata.reasoning_chain: $m v^{2} / r=B q v \text{ or } r=m v/B q; \quad r=\frac{9.11 \times 10^{-31} \times 1.7 \times 10^{7}}{3.2 \times 10^{-3} \times 1.60 \times 10^{-19}} =0.030 \mathrm{~m}$
